raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this carefully.

BPO-9 ceiling: USD 100,000
Prior releases:
- REL-DOVETAIL-1: USD 34,500
- REL-DOVETAIL-2: USD 19,500
- REL-DOVETAIL-3: USD 22,400

Total prior releases: 34,500 + 19,500 + 22,400 = USD 76,400

Current draw request: DRAW-DOVETAIL-034 asks for USD 18,000

Total if draw approved: 76,400 + 18,000 = USD 94,400

This is under the BPO-9 ceiling of USD 100,000.

According to STD-DOVETAIL-034-P: "Blanket PO draw is complete only when the requested draw plus all prior release notices under the same BPO does not exceed the BPO ceiling."

94,400 < 100,000, so this draw would be complete and allowable.

No unresolved dependencies. No blocked moves. Internal consistency check passes.

Source support: BPO-9, DRAW-DOVETAIL-034, REL-DOVETAIL-1, REL-DOVETAIL-2, REL-DOVETAIL-3, STD-DOVETAIL-034-P

This should be ALLOW.
</think>

worker_role=W3
verification_verdict=ALLOW

open_blockers=
final_answer=Allow DRAW-DOVETAIL-034 for USD 18000; the cumulative amount of USD 94400 is within the BPO-9 ceiling of USD 100000 per STD-DOVETAIL-034-P.
